  • Download Rmd

Script to validate points in ReSurvey database using RS data (S2 + SatEmb + Landsat)

Fitting Random Forest models with ntree = 500

Alicia Valdés

24 octubre 2025

This R script is used to validate the points in the ReSurvey database using either RS indicators from S2 or Landsat (indices + phenology + canopy height), or bands from the Google Satellite Embedding dataset: https://developers.google.com/earth-engine/datasets/catalog/GOOGLE_SATELLITE_EMBEDDING_V1_ANNUAL#description

Load libraries

# Not sure if all needed for this nb, CHECK!
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(gridExtra)
library(readxl)
library(scales)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(dtplyr)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(car)
library(ggeffects)
library(party)
library(partykit)
library(moreparty)
library(doParallel)
library(strucchange)
library(ggparty)
library(caret)
library(moreparty)
library(randomForest)
library(pROC)
library(corrplot)
library(rlang)
library(stringr)
library(beepr)
library(foreach)
library(permimp)
library(yardstick)
library(furrr)
library(purrr)

Load functions

knitr::purl("functions.Rmd", output = "functions.R")
[1] "functions.R"
source("functions.R")

Load previously created objects

# Define the folder path
folder_path <- here("objects", "RF_500")

# List all .RData or .rda files in the folder
rdata_files <- list.files(folder_path, full.names = TRUE)

# Load each file
lapply(rdata_files, load, envir = .GlobalEnv)

Read data

data_validation_S2 <- read_tsv(here(
  "data", "clean","final_RS_data_bands_S2_all_20251021.csv"))
data_validation_SatEmb <- read_tsv(here(
  "data", "clean","final_RS_data_SatEmb_20251010.csv")) %>%
  rename(EUNISa_1_descr = EUNIS_1_d)
data_validation_Landsat <- read_tsv(here(
  "data", "clean","final_RS_data_bands_Landsat_all_20251021.csv"))

No parsing issues!

Define lists of predictor vars

S2 and Landsat

Moments with slope method

vars_RF_slope <- c(
  # Min values of all indices
  "NDVI_min", "EVI_min", "NDMI_min", "NDWI_min", "SAVI_min",
  # Max values of NDMI and NDWI
  "NDMI_max", "NDWI_max",
  # AUC of NDVI, EVI and SAVI
  "NDVI_auc_slope", "EVI_auc_slope", "SAVI_auc_slope",
  # Values of NDVI, EVI and SAVI at sos, pos and eos
  "NDVI_sos_slope_value", "NDVI_pos_value", "NDVI_eos_slope_value",
  "EVI_sos_slope_value", "EVI_pos_value", "EVI_eos_slope_value", 
  "SAVI_sos_slope_value", "SAVI_pos_value", "SAVI_eos_slope_value",
  # Differences pos-sos in value and doy
  "NDVI_diff_pos_sos_slope_value", "EVI_diff_pos_sos_slope_value",
  "SAVI_diff_pos_sos_slope_value","NDVI_diff_pos_sos_slope_doy", 
  "EVI_diff_pos_sos_slope_doy", "SAVI_diff_pos_sos_slope_doy",
  # Differences pos-eos in value and doy
  "NDVI_diff_pos_eos_slope_value", "EVI_diff_pos_eos_slope_value",
  "SAVI_diff_pos_eos_slope_value", "NDVI_diff_pos_eos_slope_doy", 
  "EVI_diff_pos_eos_slope_doy", "SAVI_diff_pos_eos_slope_doy",
  # Growing season duration
  "NDVI_slope_gsd", "EVI_slope_gsd", "SAVI_slope_gsd",
  # Canopy height
  "canopy_height")
# Excluding EVI because many values outside of range -1, 1
vars_RF_slope_Landsat <- c(
  # Min values of all indices
  "NDVI_min", "NDMI_min", "NDWI_min", "SAVI_min",
  # Max values of NDMI and NDWI
  "NDMI_max", "NDWI_max",
  # AUC of NDVI and SAVI
  "NDVI_auc_slope", "SAVI_auc_slope",
  # Values of NDVI and SAVI at sos, pos and eos
  "NDVI_sos_slope_value", "NDVI_pos_value", "NDVI_eos_slope_value",
  "SAVI_sos_slope_value", "SAVI_pos_value", "SAVI_eos_slope_value",
  # Differences pos-sos in value and doy
  "NDVI_diff_pos_sos_slope_value","SAVI_diff_pos_sos_slope_value",
  "NDVI_diff_pos_sos_slope_doy", "SAVI_diff_pos_sos_slope_doy",
  # Differences pos-eos in value and doy
  "NDVI_diff_pos_eos_slope_value", "SAVI_diff_pos_eos_slope_value",
  "NDVI_diff_pos_eos_slope_doy", "SAVI_diff_pos_eos_slope_doy",
  # Growing season duration
  "NDVI_slope_gsd", "SAVI_slope_gsd",
  # Canopy height
  "canopy_height")

Moments with threshold method

vars_RF_threshold <- c(
  # Min values of all indices
  "NDVI_min", "EVI_min", "NDMI_min", "NDWI_min", "SAVI_min",
  # Max values of NDMI and NDWI
  "NDMI_max", "NDWI_max",
  # AUC of NDVI, EVI and SAVI
  "NDVI_auc_threshold", "EVI_auc_threshold", "SAVI_auc_threshold",
  # Values of NDVI, EVI and SAVI at sos, pos and eos
  "NDVI_sos_threshold_value", "NDVI_pos_value", "NDVI_eos_threshold_value",
  "EVI_sos_threshold_value", "EVI_pos_value", "EVI_eos_threshold_value", 
  "SAVI_sos_threshold_value", "SAVI_pos_value", "SAVI_eos_threshold_value",
  # Differences pos-sos in value and doy
  "NDVI_diff_pos_sos_threshold_value", "EVI_diff_pos_sos_threshold_value",
  "SAVI_diff_pos_sos_threshold_value","NDVI_diff_pos_sos_threshold_doy", 
  "EVI_diff_pos_sos_threshold_doy", "SAVI_diff_pos_sos_threshold_doy",
  # Differences pos-eos in value and doy
  "NDVI_diff_pos_eos_threshold_value", "EVI_diff_pos_eos_threshold_value",
  "SAVI_diff_pos_eos_threshold_value", "NDVI_diff_pos_eos_threshold_doy", 
  "EVI_diff_pos_eos_threshold_doy", "SAVI_diff_pos_eos_threshold_doy",
  # Growing season duration
  "NDVI_threshold_gsd", "EVI_threshold_gsd", "SAVI_threshold_gsd",
  # Canopy height
  "canopy_height")
# Excluding EVI because many values outside of range -1, 1
vars_RF_threshold_Landsat <- c(
  # Min values of all indices

  # Max values of NDMI and NDWI
  "NDMI_max", "NDWI_max",
  # AUC of NDVI and SAVI
  "NDVI_auc_threshold", "SAVI_auc_threshold",
  # Values of NDVI and SAVI at sos, pos and eos
  "NDVI_sos_threshold_value", "NDVI_pos_value", "NDVI_eos_threshold_value",
  "SAVI_sos_threshold_value", "SAVI_pos_value", "SAVI_eos_threshold_value",
  # Differences pos-sos in value and doy
  "NDVI_diff_pos_sos_threshold_value", "SAVI_diff_pos_sos_threshold_value",
  "NDVI_diff_pos_sos_threshold_doy", "SAVI_diff_pos_sos_threshold_doy",
  # Differences pos-eos in value and doy
  "NDVI_diff_pos_eos_threshold_value", "SAVI_diff_pos_eos_threshold_value",
  "NDVI_diff_pos_eos_threshold_doy", "SAVI_diff_pos_eos_threshold_doy",
  # Growing season duration
  "NDVI_threshold_gsd", "SAVI_threshold_gsd",
  # Canopy height
  "canopy_height")

Months method

vars_RF_months <- c(
  # Min values of all indices
  "NDVI_min", "EVI_min", "NDMI_min", "NDWI_min", "SAVI_min",
  # Max values of NDMI and NDWI
  "NDMI_max", "NDWI_max",
  # AUC of NDVI, EVI and SAVI between march and oct
  "NDVI_auc_mar_oct", "EVI_auc_mar_oct", "SAVI_auc_mar_oct",
  # Values of NDVI, EVI and SAVI at march, pos and oct
  "NDVI_avg_value_03", "NDVI_pos_value", "NDVI_avg_value_10",
  "EVI_avg_value_03", "EVI_pos_value", "EVI_avg_value_10", 
  "SAVI_avg_value_03", "SAVI_pos_value", "SAVI_avg_value_10",
  # Differences pos-march in value and doy
  "NDVI_diff_pos_march_value", "EVI_diff_pos_march_value",
  "SAVI_diff_pos_march_value","NDVI_diff_pos_march_doy", 
  "EVI_diff_pos_march_doy", "SAVI_diff_pos_march_doy",
  # Differences pos-oct in value and doy
  "NDVI_diff_pos_oct_value", "EVI_diff_pos_oct_value",
  "SAVI_diff_pos_oct_value", "NDVI_diff_pos_oct_doy", 
  "EVI_diff_pos_oct_doy", "SAVI_diff_pos_oct_doy",
  # Canopy height
  "canopy_height")
# Excluding EVI because many values outside of range -1, 1
vars_RF_months_Landsat <- c(
  # Min values of all indices
  "NDVI_min", "NDMI_min", "NDWI_min", "SAVI_min",
  # Max values of NDMI and NDWI
  "NDMI_max", "NDWI_max",
  # AUC of NDVI, and SAVI between march and oct
  "NDVI_auc_mar_oct", "SAVI_auc_mar_oct",
  # Values of NDVI and SAVI at march, pos and oct
  "NDVI_avg_value_03", "NDVI_pos_value", "NDVI_avg_value_10",
  "SAVI_avg_value_03", "SAVI_pos_value", "SAVI_avg_value_10",
  # Differences pos-march in value and doy
  "NDVI_diff_pos_march_value", "SAVI_diff_pos_march_value",
  "NDVI_diff_pos_march_doy", "SAVI_diff_pos_march_doy",
  # Differences pos-oct in value and doy
  "NDVI_diff_pos_oct_value", "SAVI_diff_pos_oct_value",
  "NDVI_diff_pos_oct_doy", "SAVI_diff_pos_oct_doy",
  # Canopy height
  "canopy_height")

SatEmb

vars_RF_SatEmb <- colnames(
  data_validation_SatEmb)[startsWith(colnames(data_validation_SatEmb), "A")]
vars_RF_SatEmb_CH <- c(vars_RF_SatEmb, "canopy_height")

Filter data to use in RF models

Functions

filter_data_S2 <- function(data, variables) {
  data %>%
    mutate(EUNISa_1 = as.factor(EUNISa_1)) %>%
    # Remove rows with missing values in predictors
    dplyr::filter(if_all(all_of(variables), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    # Remove all rows with wrong values of indices (not between -1 and 1)
    dplyr::filter(NDVI_max <= 1 & NDVI_min >= -1) %>%
    dplyr::filter(EVI_max <= 1 & EVI_min >= -1) %>%
    dplyr::filter(SAVI_max <= 1 & SAVI_min >= -1) %>%
    dplyr::filter(NDMI_max <= 1 & NDMI_min >= -1) %>%
    dplyr::filter(NDWI_max <= 1 & NDWI_min >= -1) %>%
    # Select only variables needed
    select(PlotObservationID, EUNISa_1, all_of(variables), Lctnmth,
           valid_1) %>%
    # Keep only rows with differences > 0 in variables
    filter(if_all(any_of(variables[grepl("diff", variables)]), 
                  ~ .x > 0)) %>%
    # Select only GPS points
    dplyr::filter(Lctnmth == "Location with GPS" | 
                    Lctnmth == "Location with differential GPS")
}
filter_data_Landsat <- function(data, variables) {
  data %>%
    mutate(EUNISa_1 = as.factor(EUNISa_1)) %>%
    # Remove rows with missing values in predictors
    dplyr::filter(if_all(all_of(variables), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    # Remove all rows with wrong values of indices (not between -1 and 1)
    dplyr::filter(NDVI_max <= 1 & NDVI_min >= -1) %>%
    # With Landsat data, many observations removed because of high/low EVI values
    # In Landsat_extraction, values of EVI outside of expected range were set as NA,
    # so better not to use EVI here
    # dplyr::filter(EVI_max <= 1 & EVI_min >= -1) %>%
    dplyr::filter(SAVI_max <= 1 & SAVI_min >= -1) %>%
    dplyr::filter(NDMI_max <= 1 & NDMI_min >= -1) %>%
    dplyr::filter(NDWI_max <= 1 & NDWI_min >= -1) %>%
    # Select only variables needed
    select(PlotObservationID, EUNISa_1, all_of(variables), Lctnmth,
           valid_1) %>%
    # Keep only rows with differences > 0 in variables
    filter(if_all(any_of(variables[grepl("diff", variables)]), 
                  ~ .x > 0)) %>%
    # Select only GPS points
    dplyr::filter(Lctnmth == "Location with GPS" | 
                    Lctnmth == "Location with differential GPS")
}
filter_data_SatEmb <- function(data, variables) {
  data %>%
    mutate(EUNISa_1 = as.factor(EUNISa_1)) %>%
    # Remove rows with missing values in predictors
    dplyr::filter(if_all(all_of(variables), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    # Select only variables needed
    select(PlotObservationID, EUNISa_1, all_of(variables), 
           Lctnmth, valid_1) %>%
    # Select only GPS points
    dplyr::filter(Lctnmth == "Location with GPS" |
                    Lctnmth == "Location with differential GPS")
  }

Reduction in n observations

#### S2 months ####

# List of filtering steps
steps_S2_months <- list(
  "Original" = data_validation_S2,
  "Rough validation" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2),
  "No NA in predictors" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_months), ~ !is.na(.))),
  "NDVI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_months), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1),
  "EVI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_months), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           EVI_max <= 1, EVI_min >= -1),
  "SAVI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_months), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           EVI_max <= 1, EVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1),
  "NDMI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_months), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           EVI_max <= 1, EVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1),
  "NDWI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_months), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           EVI_max <= 1, EVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1),
  "Positive differences" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_months), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           EVI_max <= 1, EVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1) %>%
    # Keep only rows with differences > 0 in vars_RF_months
    filter(if_all(any_of(vars_RF_months[grepl("diff", vars_RF_months)]), 
                  ~ .x > 0)),
  "Located with any GPS" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_months), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           EVI_max <= 1, EVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_months), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    # Keep only rows with differences > 0 in vars_RF_months
    filter(if_all(any_of(vars_RF_months[grepl("diff", vars_RF_months)]), 
                  ~ .x > 0)) %>%
    filter(Lctnmth %in% c("Location with GPS","Location with differential GPS")),
  "Located with differential GPS" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_months), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           EVI_max <= 1, EVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_months), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    # Keep only rows with differences > 0 in vars_RF_months
    filter(if_all(any_of(vars_RF_months[grepl("diff", vars_RF_months)]), 
                  ~ .x > 0)) %>%
    filter(Lctnmth %in% c("Location with differential GPS"))
)

# Table with columns per category
summary_S2_months <- map_df(names(steps_S2_months), function(name) {
  df <- steps_S2_months[[name]]
  df %>%
    count(EUNISa_1, name = "n") %>%
    mutate(Step = name)
}) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = EUNISa_1, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(Total = rowSums(select(., -Step)))

print(summary_S2_months)

# Plot
ggplot(summary_S2_months %>%
         pivot_longer(cols = 2:6, names_to = "EUNIS", values_to = "Count") %>%
         filter(EUNIS != "Total") %>%
         mutate(Step = factor(Step, levels = c("Original", "Rough validation",
                                               "No NA in predictors",
                                               "NDVI between -1 and 1",
                                               "EVI between -1 and 1",
                                               "SAVI between -1 and 1",
                                               "NDMI between -1 and 1",
                                               "NDWI between -1 and 1",
                                               "Positive differences",
                                               "Located with any GPS",
                                               "Located with differential GPS"))), 
       aes(x = Step, y = Count, fill = EUNIS, group = EUNIS)) +
  geom_col() +
  ylab("Number of observations") + theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("Reduction in number of observations with filtering steps",
          subtitle = "S2 months") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
ggsave(here("output", "figures", "RF", "filtering_S2_months.jpeg"), dpi = 300,
       width = 8, height = 6)

#### S2 slope ####

# List of filtering steps
steps_S2_slope <- list(
  "Original" = data_validation_S2,
  "Rough validation" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2),
  "No NA in predictors" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope), ~ !is.na(.))),
  "NDVI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1),
  "EVI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           EVI_max <= 1, EVI_min >= -1),
  "SAVI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           EVI_max <= 1, EVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1),
  "NDMI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           EVI_max <= 1, EVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1),
  "NDWI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           EVI_max <= 1, EVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1),
  "Positive differences" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           EVI_max <= 1, EVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    # Keep only rows with differences > 0 in vars_RF_slope
    filter(if_all(any_of(vars_RF_slope[grepl("diff", vars_RF_slope)]), 
                  ~ .x > 0)),
  "Located with any GPS" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           EVI_max <= 1, EVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    # Keep only rows with differences > 0 in vars_RF_slope
    filter(if_all(any_of(vars_RF_slope[grepl("diff", vars_RF_slope)]), 
                  ~ .x > 0)) %>%
    filter(Lctnmth %in% c("Location with GPS","Location with differential GPS")),
  "Located with differential GPS" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           EVI_max <= 1, EVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    # Keep only rows with differences > 0 in vars_RF_slope
    filter(if_all(any_of(vars_RF_slope[grepl("diff", vars_RF_slope)]), 
                  ~ .x > 0)) %>%
    filter(Lctnmth %in% c("Location with differential GPS"))
)

# Table with columns per category
summary_S2_slope <- map_df(names(steps_S2_slope), function(name) {
  df <- steps_S2_slope[[name]]
  df %>%
    count(EUNISa_1, name = "n") %>%
    mutate(Step = name)
}) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = EUNISa_1, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(Total = rowSums(select(., -Step)))

print(summary_S2_slope)

# Plot
ggplot(summary_S2_slope %>%
         pivot_longer(cols = 2:6, names_to = "EUNIS", values_to = "Count") %>%
         filter(EUNIS != "Total") %>%
         mutate(Step = factor(Step, levels = c("Original", "Rough validation",
                                               "No NA in predictors",
                                               "NDVI between -1 and 1",
                                               "EVI between -1 and 1",
                                               "SAVI between -1 and 1",
                                               "NDMI between -1 and 1",
                                               "NDWI between -1 and 1",
                                               "Positive differences",
                                               "Located with any GPS",
                                               "Located with differential GPS"))), 
       aes(x = Step, y = Count, fill = EUNIS, group = EUNIS)) +
  geom_col() +
  ylab("Number of observations") + theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("Reduction in number of observations with filtering steps",
          subtitle = "S2 slope") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
ggsave(here("output", "figures", "RF", "filtering_S2_slope.jpeg"), dpi = 300,
       width = 8, height = 6)

#### S2 threshold ####

# List of filtering steps
steps_S2_threshold <- list(
  "Original" = data_validation_S2,
  "Rough validation" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2),
  "No NA in predictors" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold), ~ !is.na(.))),
  "NDVI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1),
  "EVI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           EVI_max <= 1, EVI_min >= -1),
  "SAVI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           EVI_max <= 1, EVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1),
  "NDMI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           EVI_max <= 1, EVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1),
  "NDWI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           EVI_max <= 1, EVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1),
  "Positive differences" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           EVI_max <= 1, EVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    # Keep only rows with differences > 0 in vars_RF_threshold
    filter(if_all(any_of(vars_RF_threshold[grepl("diff", vars_RF_threshold)]), 
                  ~ .x > 0)),
  "Located with any GPS" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           EVI_max <= 1, EVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    # Keep only rows with differences > 0 in vars_RF_threshold
    filter(if_all(any_of(vars_RF_threshold[grepl("diff", vars_RF_threshold)]), 
                  ~ .x > 0)) %>%
    filter(Lctnmth %in% c("Location with GPS","Location with differential GPS")),
  "Located with differential GPS" = rough_validation_S2(data_validation_S2) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           EVI_max <= 1, EVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    # Keep only rows with differences > 0 in vars_RF_threshold
    filter(if_all(any_of(vars_RF_threshold[grepl("diff", vars_RF_threshold)]), 
                  ~ .x > 0)) %>%
    filter(Lctnmth %in% c("Location with differential GPS"))
)

# Table with columns per category
summary_S2_threshold <- map_df(names(steps_S2_threshold), function(name) {
  df <- steps_S2_threshold[[name]]
  df %>%
    count(EUNISa_1, name = "n") %>%
    mutate(Step = name)
}) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = EUNISa_1, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(Total = rowSums(select(., -Step)))

# Plot

         pivot_longer(cols = 2:6, names_to = "EUNIS", values_to = "Count") %>%

                                               "EVI between -1 and 1",
                                               "SAVI between -1 and 1",
                                               "NDMI between -1 and 1",
                                               "NDWI between -1 and 1",
                                               "Positive differences",
                                               "Located with any GPS",
                                               "Located with differential GPS"))), 
       aes(x = Step, y = Count, fill = EUNIS, group = EUNIS)) +
  geom_col() +
  ylab("Number of observations") + theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("Reduction in number of observations with filtering steps",
          subtitle = "S2 threshold") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

# List of filtering steps
steps_Landsat_months <- list(
  "Original" = data_validation_Landsat,
  "Rough validation" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat),
  "No NA in predictors" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_months_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))),
  "NDVI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_months_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 2, NDVI_min >= -2),
  "SAVI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_months_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1),
  "NDMI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_months_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1),
  "NDWI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_months_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1),
  "Positive differences" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_months_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_months_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    # Keep only rows with differences > 0 in vars_RF_months_Landsat
    filter(if_all(any_of(vars_RF_months_Landsat[grepl("diff", vars_RF_months_Landsat)]), 
                  ~ .x > 0)),
  "Located with any GPS" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_months_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_months_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    # Keep only rows with differences > 0 in vars_RF_months_Landsat
    filter(if_all(any_of(vars_RF_months_Landsat[grepl("diff", vars_RF_months_Landsat)]), 
                  ~ .x > 0)) %>%
    filter(Lctnmth %in% c("Location with GPS","Location with differential GPS")),
  "Located with differential GPS" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_months_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_months_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    # Keep only rows with differences > 0 in vars_RF_months_Landsat

                  ~ .x > 0)) %>%

)

# Table with columns per category

  df %>%
    count(EUNISa_1, name = "n") %>%
    mutate(Step = name)
}) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = EUNISa_1, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(Total = rowSums(select(., -Step)))

# Plot

         pivot_longer(cols = 2:6, names_to = "EUNIS", values_to = "Count") %>%

                                               "EVI between -1 and 1",

                                               "NDMI between -1 and 1",
                                               "NDWI between -1 and 1",
                                               "Positive differences",
                                               "Located with any GPS",
                                               "Located with differential GPS"))),

          subtitle = "Landsat months") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

#### Landsat slope ####

# List of filtering steps
steps_Landsat_slope <- list(
  "Original" = data_validation_Landsat,
  "Rough validation" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat),
  "No NA in predictors" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))),
  "NDVI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1),
  "SAVI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1),
  "NDMI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1),
  "NDWI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1),
  "Positive differences" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    # Keep only rows with differences > 0 in vars_RF_slope
    filter(if_all(any_of(vars_RF_slope_Landsat[grepl("diff", 
                                                     vars_RF_slope_Landsat)]), 
                  ~ .x > 0)),
  "Located with any GPS" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    # Keep only rows with differences > 0 in vars_RF_slope
    filter(if_all(any_of(vars_RF_slope_Landsat[grepl("diff", 
                                                     vars_RF_slope_Landsat)]), 
                  ~ .x > 0)) %>%
    filter(Lctnmth %in% c("Location with GPS","Location with differential GPS")),
  "Located with differential GPS" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_slope_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    # Keep only rows with differences > 0 in vars_RF_slope
    filter(if_all(any_of(vars_RF_slope_Landsat[grepl("diff", 
                                                     vars_RF_slope_Landsat)]), 
                  ~ .x > 0)) %>%
    filter(Lctnmth %in% c("Location with differential GPS"))
)

# Table with columns per category

  df <- steps_Landsat_slope[[name]]
  df %>%
    count(EUNISa_1, name = "n") %>%
    mutate(Step = name)
}) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = EUNISa_1, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(Total = rowSums(select(., -Step)))

print(summary_Landsat_slope)

# Plot

         pivot_longer(cols = 2:6, names_to = "EUNIS", values_to = "Count") %>%
         filter(EUNIS != "Total") %>%
         mutate(Step = factor(Step, levels = c("Original", "Rough validation",
                                               "No NA in predictors",
                                               "NDVI between -1 and 1",
                                               "EVI between -1 and 1",
                                               "SAVI between -1 and 1",
                                               "NDMI between -1 and 1",
                                               "NDWI between -1 and 1",
                                               "Positive differences",
                                               "Located with any GPS",
                                               "Located with differential GPS"))), 
       aes(x = Step, y = Count, fill = EUNIS, group = EUNIS)) +
  geom_col() +
  ylab("Number of observations") + theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("Reduction in number of observations with filtering steps",
          subtitle = "Landsat slope") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

       width = 8, height = 6)

#### Landsat threshold ####

# List of filtering steps
steps_Landsat_threshold <- list(
  "Original" = data_validation_Landsat,
  "Rough validation" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat),
  "No NA in predictors" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))),
  "NDVI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1),
  "SAVI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1),
  "NDMI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1),
  "NDWI between -1 and 1" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1),
  "Positive differences" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    # Keep only rows with differences > 0 in vars_RF_threshold
    filter(if_all(any_of(vars_RF_threshold_Landsat[grepl("diff",
                                                         vars_RF_threshold_Landsat)]),
                  ~ .x > 0)),
  "Located with any GPS" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    # Keep only rows with differences > 0 in vars_RF_threshold
    filter(if_all(any_of(vars_RF_threshold_Landsat[grepl("diff",
                                                         vars_RF_threshold_Landsat)]), 
                  ~ .x > 0)) %>%
    filter(Lctnmth %in% c("Location with GPS","Location with differential GPS")),
  "Located with differential GPS" = rough_validation_Landsat(data_validation_Landsat) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(NDVI_max <= 1, NDVI_min >= -1,
           SAVI_max <= 1, SAVI_min >= -1,
           NDMI_max <= 1, NDMI_min >= -1,
           NDWI_max <= 1, NDWI_min >= -1) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_threshold_Landsat), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    # Keep only rows with differences > 0 in vars_RF_threshold
    filter(if_all(any_of(vars_RF_threshold_Landsat[grepl("diff",
                                                         vars_RF_threshold_Landsat)]), 
                  ~ .x > 0)) %>%
    filter(Lctnmth %in% c("Location with differential GPS"))
)

# Table with columns per category
summary_Landsat_threshold <- map_df(names(steps_Landsat_threshold), function(name) {
  df <- steps_Landsat_threshold[[name]]
  df %>%
    count(EUNISa_1, name = "n") %>%
    mutate(Step = name)
}) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = EUNISa_1, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(Total = rowSums(select(., -Step)))

print(summary_Landsat_threshold)

# Plot
ggplot(summary_Landsat_threshold %>%
         pivot_longer(cols = 2:6, names_to = "EUNIS", values_to = "Count") %>%
         filter(EUNIS != "Total") %>%
         mutate(Step = factor(Step, levels = c("Original", "Rough validation",
                                               "No NA in predictors",
                                               "NDVI between -1 and 1",
                                               "EVI between -1 and 1",
                                               "SAVI between -1 and 1",
                                               "NDMI between -1 and 1",
                                               "NDWI between -1 and 1",
                                               "Positive differences",
                                               "Located with any GPS",
                                               "Located with differential GPS"))), 
       aes(x = Step, y = Count, fill = EUNIS, group = EUNIS)) +
  geom_col() +
  ylab("Number of observations") + theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("Reduction in number of observations with filtering steps",
          subtitle = "Landsat threshold") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
ggsave(here("output", "figures", "RF", "filtering_Landsat_threshold.jpeg"), dpi = 300,
       width = 8, height = 6)

#### SatEmb ####

steps_SatEmb <- list(
  "Original" = data_validation_SatEmb,
  "Rough validation" = rough_validation_SatEmb(data_validation_SatEmb),
  "No NA in predictors" = rough_validation_SatEmb(data_validation_SatEmb) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_SatEmb), ~ !is.na(.))),
  "Located with any GPS" = rough_validation_SatEmb(data_validation_SatEmb) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_SatEmb), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(Lctnmth %in% c("Location with GPS","Location with differential GPS")),
  "Located with differential GPS" = rough_validation_SatEmb(data_validation_SatEmb) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_SatEmb), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(Lctnmth %in% c("Location with differential GPS"))
)
   
# Table with columns per category
summary_SatEmb <- map_df(names(steps_SatEmb), function(name) {
  df <- steps_SatEmb[[name]]
  df %>%
    count(EUNISa_1, name = "n") %>%
    mutate(Step = name)
}) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = EUNISa_1, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(Total = rowSums(select(., -Step)))

print(summary_SatEmb)

# Plot
ggplot(summary_SatEmb %>%
         pivot_longer(cols = 2:6, names_to = "EUNIS", values_to = "Count") %>%
         filter(EUNIS != "Total") %>%
         mutate(Step = factor(Step, levels = c("Original", "Rough validation",
                                               "No NA in predictors",
                                               "Located with any GPS",
                                               "Located with differential GPS"))), 
       aes(x = Step, y = Count, fill = EUNIS, group = EUNIS)) +
  geom_col() +
  ylab("Number of observations") + theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("Reduction in number of observations with filtering steps",
          subtitle = "Satellite Embeddings") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
ggsave(here("output", "figures", "RF", "filtering_SatEmb.jpeg"), dpi = 300,
       width = 8, height = 6)

#### SatEmb_CH ####

steps_SatEmb_CH <- list(
  "Original" = data_validation_SatEmb,
  "Rough validation" = rough_validation_SatEmb(data_validation_SatEmb),
  "No NA in predictors" = rough_validation_SatEmb(data_validation_SatEmb) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_SatEmb_CH), ~ !is.na(.))),
  "Located with any GPS" = rough_validation_SatEmb(data_validation_SatEmb) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_SatEmb_CH), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(Lctnmth %in% c("Location with GPS","Location with differential GPS")),
  "Located with differential GPS" = rough_validation_SatEmb(data_validation_SatEmb) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(vars_RF_SatEmb_CH), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
    filter(Lctnmth %in% c("Location with differential GPS"))
)

# Table with columns per category
summary_SatEmb_CH <- map_df(names(steps_SatEmb_CH), function(name) {
  df <- steps_SatEmb_CH[[name]]
  df %>%
    count(EUNISa_1, name = "n") %>%
    mutate(Step = name)
}) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = EUNISa_1, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(Total = rowSums(select(., -Step)))

print(summary_SatEmb_CH)

# Plot
ggplot(summary_SatEmb_CH %>%
         pivot_longer(cols = 2:6, names_to = "EUNIS", values_to = "Count") %>%
         filter(EUNIS != "Total") %>%
         mutate(Step = factor(Step, levels = c("Original", "Rough validation",
                                               "No NA in predictors",
                                               "Located with any GPS",
                                               "Located with differential GPS"))), 
       aes(x = Step, y = Count, fill = EUNIS, group = EUNIS)) +
  geom_col() +
  ylab("Number of observations") + theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("Reduction in number of observations with filtering steps",
          subtitle = "Satellite Embeddings + CH") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
ggsave(here("output", "figures", "RF", "filtering_SatEmb_CH.jpeg"), dpi = 300,
       width = 8, height = 6)

Summary plot

bind_rows(
  summary_S2_months %>%
    mutate(sensor = "S2", method = "months"),
  summary_S2_slope %>%
    mutate(sensor = "S2", method = "slope"),
  summary_S2_threshold %>%
    mutate(sensor = "S2", method = "threshold"),
  summary_Landsat_months %>%
    mutate(sensor = "Landsat", method = "months"),
  summary_Landsat_slope %>%
    mutate(sensor = "Landsat", method = "slope"),
  summary_Landsat_threshold %>%
    mutate(sensor = "Landsat", method = "threshold"),
  summary_SatEmb %>%
    mutate(sensor = "SatEmb", method = "SatEmb only"),
  summary_SatEmb_CH %>%
    mutate(sensor ="SatEmb", method ="Satemb + CH")
) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 2:6, names_to = "EUNIS", values_to = "Count") %>%
  filter(EUNIS != "Total") %>%
  mutate(Step = factor(Step, levels = c("Original", "Rough validation",
                                        "No NA in predictors",
                                        "NDVI between -1 and 1",
                                        "EVI between -1 and 1",
                                        "SAVI between -1 and 1",
                                        "NDMI between -1 and 1",
                                        "NDWI between -1 and 1",
                                        "Positive differences",
                                        "Located with any GPS",
                                        "Located with differential GPS"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Step, y = Count, fill = EUNIS, group = EUNIS)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~ sensor + method, scales = "free_y") +
  ylab("Number of observations") + theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("Reduction in number of observations with filtering steps") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))  
ggsave(here("output", "figures", "RF", "filtering_summary.jpeg"), dpi = 300,
       width = 14, height = 10)

Counts of NAs in predictor vars

data_validation_S2 %>%
  rough_validation_S2() %>%
  # Count NAs in each colum
  summarise(across(all_of(vars_RF_months), ~ sum(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "Variable", values_to = "Missing_Count") %>%
  # Arrange in descending order of count of NAs
  arrange(desc(Missing_Count))
data_validation_S2 %>%
  rough_validation_S2() %>%
  # Count NAs in each colum
  summarise(across(all_of(vars_RF_slope), ~ sum(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "Variable", values_to = "Missing_Count") %>%
  # Arrange in descending order of count of NAs
  arrange(desc(Missing_Count))
data_validation_S2 %>%
  rough_validation_S2() %>%
  # Count NAs in each colum
  summarise(across(all_of(vars_RF_threshold), ~ sum(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "Variable", values_to = "Missing_Count") %>%
  # Arrange in descending order of count of NAs
  arrange(desc(Missing_Count))
data_validation_Landsat %>%
  rough_validation_Landsat() %>%
  # Count NAs in each colum
  summarise(across(all_of(vars_RF_months_Landsat), ~ sum(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "Variable", values_to = "Missing_Count") %>%
  # Arrange in descending order of count of NAs
  arrange(desc(Missing_Count))
data_validation_Landsat %>%
  rough_validation_Landsat() %>%
  # Count NAs in each colum
  summarise(across(all_of(vars_RF_slope_Landsat), ~ sum(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "Variable", values_to = "Missing_Count") %>%
  # Arrange in descending order of count of NAs
  arrange(desc(Missing_Count))
data_validation_Landsat %>%
  rough_validation_Landsat() %>%
  # Count NAs in each colum
  summarise(across(all_of(vars_RF_threshold_Landsat), ~ sum(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "Variable", values_to = "Missing_Count") %>%
  # Arrange in descending order of count of NAs
  arrange(desc(Missing_Count))
data_validation_SatEmb %>%
  rough_validation_SatEmb() %>%
  # Count NAs in each colum
  summarise(across(all_of(vars_RF_SatEmb), ~ sum(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "Variable", values_to = "Missing_Count") %>%
  # Arrange in descending order of count of NAs
  arrange(desc(Missing_Count))
data_validation_SatEmb %>%
  rough_validation_SatEmb() %>%
  # Count NAs in each colum
  summarise(across(all_of(vars_RF_SatEmb_CH), ~ sum(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "Variable", values_to = "Missing_Count") %>%
  # Arrange in descending order of count of NAs
  arrange(desc(Missing_Count))

Filtered data

Select only GPS points that have passed the rough validation in each case.

For S2 and Landsat, se only slope and months methods, as threshold method has many missing values.

# S2
filtered_data_slope_S2 <- filter_data_S2(
  data_validation_S2 %>%
    rough_validation_S2(), # Rough validation based on CH and NDWI
  vars_RF_slope)
filtered_data_months_S2 <- filter_data_S2(
  data_validation_S2 %>%
    rough_validation_S2(), # Rough validation based on CH and NDWI
  vars_RF_months)

# Landsat
filtered_data_slope_Landsat <- filter_data_Landsat(
  data_validation_Landsat %>%
    rough_validation_Landsat(), # Rough validation based on NDWI
  vars_RF_slope_Landsat)
filtered_data_months_Landsat <- filter_data_Landsat(
  data_validation_Landsat %>%
    rough_validation_Landsat(), # Rough validation based on NDWI
  vars_RF_months_Landsat)

# SatEmb
filtered_data_SatEmb <- filter_data_SatEmb(
  data_validation_SatEmb %>%
    rough_validation_SatEmb(), # Rough validation based on CH
  vars_RF_SatEmb)
filtered_data_SatEmb_CH <- filter_data_SatEmb(
  data_validation_SatEmb %>%
    rough_validation_SatEmb(), # Rough validation based on CH
  vars_RF_SatEmb_CH)

Fit RF models (level 1)

Without refinement

N points per category

bind_rows(
  # S2
  filtered_data_slope_S2 %>% count(EUNISa_1) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = EUNISa_1, values_from = n) %>% 
    mutate(sensor = "S2", method = "slope") %>% 
    select(sensor, method, Q, R, S, T),
  filtered_data_months_S2 %>% count(EUNISa_1) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = EUNISa_1, values_from = n) %>% 
    mutate(sensor = "S2", method = "months") %>% 
    select(sensor, method, Q, R, S, T),
  # # Landsat
  filtered_data_slope_Landsat %>% count(EUNISa_1) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = EUNISa_1, values_from = n) %>%
    mutate(sensor = "Landsat", method = "slope") %>% 
    select(sensor, method, Q, R, S, T),
  filtered_data_months_Landsat %>% count(EUNISa_1) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = EUNISa_1, values_from = n) %>%
    mutate(sensor = "Landsat", method = "months") %>% 
    select(sensor, method, Q, R, S, T),
  # SatEmb
  filtered_data_SatEmb %>% count(EUNISa_1) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = EUNISa_1, values_from = n) %>% 
    mutate(sensor = "SatEmb", method ="SatEmb only") %>% 
    select(sensor, method, Q, R, S, T),
  filtered_data_SatEmb_CH %>% count(EUNISa_1) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = EUNISa_1, values_from = n) %>% 
    mutate(sensor = "SatEmb", method ="SatEmb + CH") %>% 
    select(sensor, method, Q, R, S, T)
)
bind_rows(
  # S2
  filtered_data_slope_S2 %>% count(EUNISa_1) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = EUNISa_1, values_from = n) %>% 
    mutate(sensor = "S2", method = "slope") %>% 
    select(sensor, method, Q, R, S, T),
  filtered_data_months_S2 %>% count(EUNISa_1) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = EUNISa_1, values_from = n) %>% 
    mutate(sensor = "S2", method = "months") %>% 
    select(sensor, method, Q, R, S, T),
  # # Landsat
  filtered_data_slope_Landsat %>% count(EUNISa_1) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = EUNISa_1, values_from = n) %>%
    mutate(sensor = "Landsat", method = "slope") %>% 
    select(sensor, method, Q, R, S, T),
  filtered_data_months_Landsat %>% count(EUNISa_1) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = EUNISa_1, values_from = n) %>%
    mutate(sensor = "Landsat", method = "months") %>% 
    select(sensor, method, Q, R, S, T),
  # SatEmb
  filtered_data_SatEmb %>% count(EUNISa_1) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = EUNISa_1, values_from = n) %>% 
    mutate(sensor = "SatEmb", method ="SatEmb only") %>% 
    select(sensor, method, Q, R, S, T),
  filtered_data_SatEmb_CH %>% count(EUNISa_1) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = EUNISa_1, values_from = n) %>% 
    mutate(sensor = "SatEmb", method ="SatEmb + CH") %>% 
    select(sensor, method, Q, R, S, T)
) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = 3:6, names_to = "EUNIS", values_to = "Count") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = EUNIS, y = Count, fill = EUNIS, group = EUNIS)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~ sensor + method) + theme_bw() +
  # ggtitle("Reduction in number of observations with filtering steps") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

Split into training and test data sets

Set seed for reproducibility:

set.seed(123)

Split data:

# S2
train_data_slope_S2 <- split_train_test(filtered_data_slope_S2)$train
test_data_slope_S2 <- split_train_test(filtered_data_slope_S2)$test
train_data_months_S2 <- split_train_test(filtered_data_months_S2)$train
test_data_months_S2 <- split_train_test(filtered_data_months_S2)$test

# Landsat
train_data_slope_Landsat <- split_train_test(filtered_data_slope_Landsat)$train
test_data_slope_Landsat <- split_train_test(filtered_data_slope_Landsat)$test
train_data_months_Landsat <- split_train_test(filtered_data_months_Landsat)$train
test_data_months_Landsat <- split_train_test(filtered_data_months_Landsat)$test

# SatEmb
train_data_SatEmb <- split_train_test(filtered_data_SatEmb)$train
test_data_SatEmb <- split_train_test(filtered_data_SatEmb)$test
train_data_SatEmb_CH <- split_train_test(filtered_data_SatEmb_CH)$train
test_data_SatEmb_CH <- split_train_test(filtered_data_SatEmb_CH)$test

Fit models

models_no_refin <- c("rf_slope_S2", "rf_months_S2", "rf_slope_Landsat", 
                     "rf_months_Landsat", "rf_SatEmb", "rf_SatEmb_CH")

Print the time:

for (model_name in models_no_refin) {
  obj <- get(model_name)
  cat("Time for", model_name, ":\n")
  print(obj$time)
}
Time for rf_slope_S2 :
   user  system elapsed 
  10.51    3.74   95.36 
Time for rf_months_S2 :
   user  system elapsed 
   7.25    2.52   69.13 
Time for rf_slope_Landsat :
   user  system elapsed 
  36.17   10.68  350.75 
Time for rf_months_Landsat :
   user  system elapsed 
  12.55    3.50  146.94 
Time for rf_SatEmb :
   user  system elapsed 
  19.50    4.95  159.55 
Time for rf_SatEmb_CH :
   user  system elapsed 
  23.01    5.30  132.66

Save:

Predictions

predictions_no_refin <- c("rf_slope_S2_prediction", "rf_months_S2_prediction",
                          "rf_slope_Landsat_prediction", 
                          "rf_months_Landsat_prediction",
                          "rf_SatEmb_prediction", "rf_SatEmb_CH_prediction")

Save:

Confusion matrices

for (prediction_name in predictions_no_refin) {
  # Derive test data name by replacing "_prediction" with "" 
  # and "rf_" with "test_data_"
  test_data_name <- paste0("test_data_", sub("^rf_", "", sub("_prediction$", "",
                                                             prediction_name)))
  
  # Get prediction and test data
  prediction <- get(prediction_name)
  test_data <- get(test_data_name)
  
  # Compute confusion matrix
  cat("Confusion Matrix for", sub("_prediction$", "", prediction_name), ":\n")
  print(confusionMatrix(prediction, test_data$EUNISa_1))
  cat("\n")
}
Confusion Matrix for rf_slope_S2 :

Plots

for (prediction_name in predictions_no_refin) {
  # Derive name of test data
  test_data_name <- paste0("test_data_", sub("^rf_", "", sub("_prediction$", "",
                                                             prediction_name)))
  
  # Obtain objects
  prediction <- get(prediction_name)
  test_data <- get(test_data_name)

  # Personalized title
  title <- paste(#"Confusion Matrix for", 
    sub("_prediction$", "",
                                              prediction_name))

  # Plot
  print(plot_confusion_matrix(prediction, test_data$EUNISa_1, title))
}

Variable importance

Unconditional

varimp_no_refin <- c("rf_slope_S2_varimp", "rf_months_S2_varimp",
                     "rf_slope_Landsat_varimp", "rf_months_Landsat_varimp", 
                     "rf_SatEmb_varimp", "rf_SatEmb_CH_varimp")

Save:

Plots
for (varimp_name in varimp_no_refin) {
  cat("Plotting variable importance for", varimp_name, "...\n")
  plot(get(varimp_name)$varimp, margin = c(10, 6, 2, 2))
}

# for (varimp_cond_name in varimp_cond_no_refin) {

ROC curves

Save:

Plots

roc_plots_no_refin <- list()

for (model_name in models_no_refin) {
  roc_data_name <- paste0(model_name, "_roc_data")
  roc_df <- get(roc_data_name)$roc

  roc_plot <- ggplot(roc_df, aes(x = FPR, y = TPR, color = Class)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
    geom_abline(linetype = "dashed", color = "gray") +
    labs(title = paste("Multiclass ROC Curve -", model_name),
         x = "False Positive Rate",
         y = "True Positive Rate",
         color = "Class (AUC)") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")

  roc_plots_no_refin[[model_name]] <- roc_plot
}
roc_plots_no_refin
$rf_slope_S2

$rf_months_S2

$rf_slope_Landsat

$rf_months_Landsat

$rf_SatEmb

$rf_SatEmb_CH

With refinement

Based on PAs “Morralla protocol”.

Compute predictions for all data and combine with original data

filtered_data_with_probs <- c("filtered_data_slope_S2_with_probs",
                              "filtered_data_months_S2_with_probs",
                              "filtered_data_slope_Landsat_with_probs", 
                              "filtered_data_months_Landsat_with_probs",
                              "filtered_data_SatEmb_with_probs", 
                              "filtered_data_SatEmb_CH_with_probs")

Save:

Detect probability columns

prob_cols_slope_S2 <- names(filtered_data_slope_S2_with_probs)[grepl("^prob_", names(filtered_data_slope_S2_with_probs))]
prob_cols_months_S2 <- names(filtered_data_months_S2_with_probs)[grepl("^prob_", names(filtered_data_months_S2_with_probs))]
prob_cols_slope_Landsat <- names(filtered_data_slope_Landsat_with_probs)[grepl("^prob_", names(filtered_data_slope_Landsat_with_probs))]
prob_cols_months_Landsat <- names(filtered_data_months_Landsat_with_probs)[grepl("^prob_", names(filtered_data_months_Landsat_with_probs))]
prob_cols_SatEmb <- names(filtered_data_SatEmb_with_probs)[grepl("^prob_", names(filtered_data_SatEmb_with_probs))]
prob_cols_SatEmb_CH <- names(filtered_data_SatEmb_CH_with_probs)[grepl("^prob_", names(filtered_data_SatEmb_CH_with_probs))]

Calculate auxiliary metrics

df_aux_slope_S2 <- calculate_df_aux(filtered_data_slope_S2_with_probs,
                                     prob_cols_slope_S2)
df_aux_months_S2 <- calculate_df_aux(filtered_data_months_S2_with_probs,
                                     prob_cols_months_S2)
df_aux_slope_Landsat <- calculate_df_aux(filtered_data_slope_Landsat_with_probs,
                                     prob_cols_slope_Landsat)
df_aux_months_Landsat <- calculate_df_aux(filtered_data_months_Landsat_with_probs,
                                     prob_cols_months_Landsat)
df_aux_SatEmb <- calculate_df_aux(filtered_data_SatEmb_with_probs,
                                  prob_cols_SatEmb)
df_aux_SatEmb_CH <- calculate_df_aux(filtered_data_SatEmb_CH_with_probs,
                                     prob_cols_SatEmb_CH)

Filtering ONCE

Applying “Morralla” protocol once, removing negatives until 35% of the class and, if there is room, uncertain positives until 10% of the rest.

Apply filtering function

df_final_35_10_slope_S2 <- df_aux_slope_S2 %>%
  group_split(original_EUNIS) %>%
  map_dfr(filter_probs_neg35_pos10)
df_final_35_10_months_S2 <- df_aux_months_S2 %>%
  group_split(original_EUNIS) %>%
  map_dfr(filter_probs_neg35_pos10)
df_final_35_10_slope_Landsat <- df_aux_slope_Landsat %>%
  group_split(original_EUNIS) %>%
  map_dfr(filter_probs_neg35_pos10)
df_final_35_10_months_Landsat <- df_aux_months_Landsat %>%
  group_split(original_EUNIS) %>%
  map_dfr(filter_probs_neg35_pos10)
df_final_35_10_SatEmb <- df_aux_SatEmb %>%
  group_split(original_EUNIS) %>%
  map_dfr(filter_probs_neg35_pos10)
df_final_35_10_SatEmb_CH <- df_aux_SatEmb_CH %>%
  group_split(original_EUNIS) %>%
  map_dfr(filter_probs_neg35_pos10)
filtered_data_35_10_slope_S2_probs <- filtered_data_slope_S2 %>%
  dplyr::filter(PlotObservationID %in% df_final_35_10_slope_S2$PlotObservationID)
filtered_data_35_10_months_S2_probs <- filtered_data_months_S2 %>%
  dplyr::filter(PlotObservationID %in% df_final_35_10_months_S2$PlotObservationID)
filtered_data_35_10_slope_Landsat_probs <- filtered_data_slope_Landsat %>%
  dplyr::filter(PlotObservationID %in% df_final_35_10_slope_Landsat$PlotObservationID)
filtered_data_35_10_months_Landsat_probs <- filtered_data_months_Landsat %>%
  dplyr::filter(PlotObservationID %in% df_final_35_10_months_Landsat$PlotObservationID)
filtered_data_35_10_SatEmb_probs <- filtered_data_SatEmb %>%
  dplyr::filter(PlotObservationID %in% df_final_35_10_SatEmb$PlotObservationID)
filtered_data_35_10_SatEmb_CH_probs <- filtered_data_SatEmb_CH %>%
  dplyr::filter(PlotObservationID %in% df_final_35_10_SatEmb_CH$PlotObservationID)

Compare classes before and after

compare_classes(filtered_data_slope_S2, filtered_data_35_10_slope_S2_probs)

compare_classes(filtered_data_months_S2, filtered_data_35_10_months_S2_probs)

compare_classes(filtered_data_slope_Landsat, filtered_data_35_10_slope_Landsat_probs)

compare_classes(filtered_data_months_Landsat, filtered_data_35_10_months_Landsat_probs)

compare_classes(filtered_data_SatEmb, filtered_data_35_10_SatEmb_probs)

compare_classes(filtered_data_SatEmb_CH, filtered_data_35_10_SatEmb_CH_probs)

Split into training and testing

train_data_35_10_slope_S2_probs <-
  split_train_test(filtered_data_35_10_slope_S2_probs)$train
test_data_35_10_slope_S2_probs <-
  split_train_test(filtered_data_35_10_slope_S2_probs)$test

train_data_35_10_months_S2_probs <-
  split_train_test(filtered_data_35_10_months_S2_probs)$train
test_data_35_10_months_S2_probs <-
  split_train_test(filtered_data_35_10_months_S2_probs)$test

train_data_35_10_slope_Landsat_probs <-
  split_train_test(filtered_data_35_10_slope_Landsat_probs)$train
test_data_35_10_slope_Landsat_probs <-
  split_train_test(filtered_data_35_10_slope_Landsat_probs)$test

train_data_35_10_months_Landsat_probs <-
  split_train_test(filtered_data_35_10_months_Landsat_probs)$train
test_data_35_10_months_Landsat_probs <-
  split_train_test(filtered_data_35_10_months_Landsat_probs)$test

train_data_35_10_SatEmb_probs <-
  split_train_test(filtered_data_35_10_SatEmb_probs)$train
test_data_35_10_SatEmb_probs <-
  split_train_test(filtered_data_35_10_SatEmb_probs)$test

train_data_35_10_SatEmb_CH_probs <-
  split_train_test(filtered_data_35_10_SatEmb_CH_probs)$train
test_data_35_10_SatEmb_CH_probs <-
  split_train_test(filtered_data_35_10_SatEmb_CH_probs)$test

Fit models

models_refin_35_10 <- c("rf_slope_S2_refin_35_10", "rf_months_S2_refin_35_10",
                        "rf_slope_Landsat_refin_35_10",
                        "rf_months_Landsat_refin_35_10",
                        "rf_SatEmb_refin_35_10", "rf_SatEmb_CH_refin_35_10")

Save:

Predictions

predictions_refin_35_10 <- c("rf_slope_S2_refin_35_10_prediction",
                        "rf_months_S2_refin_35_10_prediction",
                        "rf_slope_Landsat_refin_35_10_prediction",
                        "rf_months_Landsat_refin_35_10_prediction",
                        "rf_SatEmb_refin_35_10_prediction",
                        "rf_SatEmb_CH_refin_35_10_prediction")

Save:

Confusion matrices

for (prediction_name in predictions_refin_35_10) {
  # Derive test data name
  test_data_name <- paste0(gsub("_refin_35_10$", "",
                              sub("^rf_", "test_data_35_10_", 
                                  sub("_prediction$", "", prediction_name))), 
                         "_probs")
  
  # Get prediction and test data
  prediction <- get(prediction_name)
  test_data <- get(test_data_name)
  
  # Compute confusion matrix
  cat("Confusion Matrix for", sub("_prediction$", "", prediction_name), ":\n")
  print(confusionMatrix(prediction, test_data$EUNISa_1))
  cat("\n")
}

for (prediction_name in predictions_refin_35_10) {
  # Derive test data name
  test_data_name <- paste0(gsub("_refin_35_10$", "",
                              sub("^rf_", "test_data_35_10_", 
                                  sub("_prediction$", "", prediction_name))), 
                         "_probs")
  
  # Obtain objects
  prediction <- get(prediction_name)
  test_data <- get(test_data_name)

  # Personalized title
  title <- paste("Confusion Matrix for", sub("_prediction$", "",
                                              prediction_name))

  # Plot
  print(plot_confusion_matrix(prediction, test_data$EUNISa_1, title))
}

ROC curves

Save:

Plots
roc_plots_refin_35_10 <- list()

for (model_name in models_refin_35_10) {
  roc_data_name <- paste0(model_name, "_roc_data")
  roc_df <- get(roc_data_name)$roc

  roc_plot <- ggplot(roc_df, aes(x = FPR, y = TPR, color = Class)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
    geom_abline(linetype = "dashed", color = "gray") +
    labs(title = paste("Multiclass ROC Curve -", model_name),
         x = "False Positive Rate",
         y = "True Positive Rate",
         color = "Class (AUC)") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")

  roc_plots_refin_35_10[[model_name]] <- roc_plot
}
roc_plots_refin_35_10
$rf_slope_S2_refin_35_10

$rf_months_S2_refin_35_10

$rf_slope_Landsat_refin_35_10

$rf_months_Landsat_refin_35_10

$rf_SatEmb_refin_35_10

$rf_SatEmb_CH_refin_35_10

HERE: Filtering TWICE

Applying “Morralla” protocol once, removing negatives until 20% of the class and, if there is room, uncertain positives until 5% of the rest.

Then refitting the model and applying “Morralla” protocol again with same %s.

Session info

sessionInfo()
R version 4.5.1 (2025-06-13 ucrt)
Platform: x86_64-w64-mingw32/x64
Running under: Windows 11 x64 (build 26100)

Matrix products: default
